Contacts

Reach the PTA board or the school office for your student

PTA board (both campuses)

pta@frazerschool.org

Best for membership, volunteering, and general questions.

Middle School

PTA email
ms-pta@frazerschool.org
Main office
(555) 123-4501
Address
200 Middle School Drive, Frazer, PA 19355

PTA email

Main office

Address
300 High School Road, Frazer, PA 19355

Membership forms and flyers are available in each school's main office and PTA mailbox.
